strengths: Strong SQL and BI tool experience
Experience with data quality and reconciliation
weaknesses: Only early-career years (fits role but limited tenure)
Limited explicit documentation of report logic
No explicit Looker project in resume
Few examples of KPI definitions in healthcare context
improvement_bullets: Documented report logic and data definitions for organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, ensuring a consistent 'single source of truth' for all business stakeholders and reducing report discrepancies.
Utilized Looker and Power BI to develop and maintain dashboards for tracking key performance indicators, supporting recurring performance reports and trend analysis from multiple data sources.

Developed Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, leveraging ETL principles for data extraction and transformation.
Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns, providing statistical evidence for audience response and lift, which aligns with supporting ad-hoc analysis and business reviews.
Collaborated with business stakeholders to understand reporting needs and translate complex technical findings into actionable business recommendations during regular meetings.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
Jobs via Dice

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the DATA ANALYST position at Jobs via Dice. With my background in data analysis and operations, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

I am particularly impressed by Aara Technologies Inc.'s commitment to leveraging data to drive improvements in the healthcare sector, as evidenced by your focus on data quality initiatives and robust reporting capabilities.

In my previous roles, I have developed efficient reporting workflows and robust data models to extract actionable insights from complex datasets. Additionally, I have experience in creating and maintaining dashboards using Power BI and Tableau, which directly aligns with your need for supporting healthcare reporting, analytics, and data quality initiatives.

I have a proven ability to collect, clean, and analyze data from multiple sources, ensuring data quality and performing validation checks, as demonstrated by my work in standardizing organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks. Furthermore, I have extensive experience writing SQL queries to extract and analyze data, and I am adept at translating complex technical findings into clear business recommendations for stakeholders.

I am particularly drawn to AaraTech Inc.'s mission of providing hands-on healthcare analytics experience and fostering career growth for early-career professionals. I believe my experience in data analysis, automation, and stakeholder communication would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
